notes: No API key is stored here. Configure keys with environment variables only.
auto tries Brave when BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY exists, then DuckDuckGo HTML fallback.
All providers are for public web search only. Do not log in, store cookies, or bypass anti-scraping controls.

providers.name: brave
providers.notes: Recommended default paid provider for goldfish. Default endpoint is https://api.search.brave.com/res/v1/web/search.

providers.name: duckduckgo
providers.notes: No key required. Parsing can be less stable than API providers.
